name: Multiplayer Shooters
short_description: Multiplayer Shooters - A fast paced shooter game with lots of different game modes and weapons
detailed_description:
Multiplayer Shooters

A fast paced shooter game with lots of different game modes and weapons

Multiplayer or Single Player
A.I. Bots (If You want them)
First or Third person view

Other Features:

Several different game modes -
Search & Destroy
Conquest
Kill Confirmed
Rush
Team Deathmatch
Capture the Flag
Free for All

Several unique weapons -
Assault Rifle
SMG
Shotgun
Machinegun
SniperRifle
Pistol
Knife

Dynamic Crosshair
Leaning
Weapon Sway
Equippable Knife and grenade
Fire modes (BURST, AUTO & SEMI)
Minimap
Killstreaks
Compass
Kill feed
Global/Team Chat
Claymore and grenades
Recoil & Breathing System
Sniper Scope
Hit marker
Melee
Class & Perk selection

Menus -
Main Menu
Host/Join session
Graphics, Sound, Keybinds & mouse settings

and much more…
